I am Bruno, software engineer
and data science specialist. About me.

Naive Bees Classifier using Convolutional Neural Network

May 10, 2016

Wild bees are important pollinators and the spread of colony collapse disorder has only made their role more critical. Right now it takes a lot of time and effort for researchers to gather data on wild bees. The starting point is to determine the genus - Apis (honey bee) or Bombus (bumble bee) - based on photographs of the insects, using images from BeeSpotter (http://beespotter.org/) for identifying and classifying.

In this article we will build a system that will read the images, scales it, create a dataset to make the classifier work well by creating reflected and translated versions of images. It then takes care of class imbalance by undersampling this enhanced dataset. All this processes data is then stored in numpy arrays.

The architecture of this Convolutional Neural Network is built on Python, Theano, Lasagne and others additional libraries.

The source code is available at https://github.com/brcordeiro

Life Cycle of Data Science Projects

The software development life cycle is well-known by the most IT specialists. In this article I'm going to present you a life cycle customized to data science.

Big Data Luigi And Data Flow

The amount of data in our world has been exploding, data comes in from everywhere: cameras, social networks, GPS, mobile phones, and analyzing those large data sets has become a key basis of competition, innovation, and consumer needs. We are living the called Big Data Age. Big Data, is defined by Gartner as high-volume, high-velocity, and high variety information assets that demand cost-effective, innovative forms of information processing that enable enhanced insight, decision making, and process automation.

  • Read More

Nodejs And Scalability Issues

There are some problems that impact growth technology companies and sometimes they don’t pay attention to them. One of them is downtime of their site potentially costing millions of dollars. This downtime most often is a result of an architecture that does not scale on demand as consumer transactions grow at ever increasing rates.

  • Read More

Microservice Architecture With Loopback

A large number of corporate applications has been built on the monolithic architecture model. It works for small applications when the development process, tests and implementation are simple. However, for big and complexes applications, the monolithic architecture may be an obstacle to development and implementation, hinders the use of a continuous delivery and limit the adoption of new technologies.

  • Read More

Volunteering

I’m often hearing people talking about work-life, personal life and how they try to balance it. Ok, few years ago, I was in the same group. Then, something great happened into my life: I started to travel. Somehow, who I was never came back from the first trip. I couldn’t see the world as the same way, I realized that the world is not so big as we usually think and each person has something in common to each other, doesn’t matter the difference of culture.

  • Read More

Deep Learning

Deep Learning is branch of Artificial Intelligence that tries to develop machines that perceive and understand the world, trying to get closer to how a human brain works. Human information processing mechanisms like vision and audition, suggest the need of deep architectures for extracting complex structure and building internal representation from rich sensory inputs.

  • Read More

Are We Creating Terminators

What are you working on? That’s a common question when you are meeting someone new or having a dinner with old friends. So, the answer for this question was quite easy for me in the past, it was something like “I work in Tech”, and then some comment like “you know, my computer is broken and…” came with. Few years back, this answer has changed for “I work with Machine Learning” and then more questions come with that, like “Is it something like the Terminator movies?”. So, I’ve decided to write about what exactly is Machine Learning.
